ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "profile_pic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a profile picture */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's unique username */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* User's full name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description provided by the user */,
  "external_url" TEXT /* External URL linked to the user's profile */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the profile is private */,
  "num_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of posts made by the user */,
  "num_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the user has */,
  "num_follows" INTEGER /* Total number of accounts the user follows */,
  "is_fake" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is potentially fake */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* User's birth date */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "profile_completion" REAL /* Percentage of profile completion */,
  "description_length" INTEGER /* Length of the user's description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value associated with the engagement */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the post has received */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the post */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media in the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media content */,
  "post_location" TEXT /* Location where the post was made */,
  "post_language" TEXT /* Language of the post content */,
  "post_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the follower relationship was established */,
  "is_mutual" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the follow is mutual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authentication" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the authentication record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the record belongs */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "email_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of email verification */,
  "phone_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of phone verification */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_authentication_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned this role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, post) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the metrics apply */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Count of posts made by the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Count of followers for the user */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score calculated based on user interactions */,
  "average_post_length" REAL /* Average length of the user's posts */,
  "average_engagement_per_post" REAL /* Average engagement (likes, comments) per post */,
  "engagement_trend" TEXT /* Trend of engagement over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the message */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was sent */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Settings for notifications (e.g., on, off) */,
  "visibility_settings" TEXT /* Settings for visibility (e.g., public, private) */,
  "theme_preference" TEXT /* Preferred theme */,
  "content_filter" TEXT /* Filter settings for content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "admin_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log entry */,
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user targeted by the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the admin action took place */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the admin action */,
  "action_location" TEXT /* Location where the admin action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
